channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM’s Sophomore Album ‘PUREFLOW’ Is on Its Way: Here’s When It Arrives
item.description:
[Upbeat music plays in the background]
Host: "K-pop fans, get ready to celebrate. LE SSERAFIM is back with new music. The fearless and powerful girl group just announced the release date for their second studio album, 'PUREFLOW pt. 1', and the lead single 'CELEBRATION'."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The album drops on May 22nd, with the single coming out on April 24th. The group started teasing their comeback on April 7th with a cryptic Instagram post, leaving fans wondering what's next. And now, we have our answer."
[Short music transition]
Host: "To get fans even more excited, LE SSERAFIM shared a video on their social media channels and HYBE's YouTube channel, with a powerful message: 'For we are not fearless, and therefore powerful' transforming into 'PUREFLOW'."
[Short music transition]
Host: "This is the follow-up to their debut studio album 'UNFORGIVEN' and their first release since the 2025 single 'SPAGHETTI' featuring j-hope of BTS. LE SSERAFIM has already achieved major chart success, including a top 10 placement on the Billboard 200 with 'UNFORGIVEN' and performing at Coachella in 2024."
[Closing music plays]
Host: "Get ready to join the celebration with LE SSERAFIM's new music. Mark your calendars for April 24th and May 22nd. We can't wait to see what's next for this talented group."
